subject: stephanie panus just accepted!  she starts on august 7.

emails.subject: Re: Stephanie Panus just accepted!  She starts on August 7.
emails.subject_base: Stephanie Panus just accepted!  She starts on August 7.
emails.body: Re: Stephanie Panus just accepted! She starts on August 7. Sara: Great news! I will give her a call on Monday! Hope all is going well. Again, I'm happy to participate in the legal/credit meeting on Tuesday by phone. Alos, do we need to go through my memo? Just call or e-mail me. Carol St. Clair EB 3892 713-853-3989 (Phone) 713-646-3393 (Fax) carol.st.clair@enron.com Sara Shackleton 07/21/00 11:56 AM

emails.subject_base: Stephanie Panus just accepted!  She starts on August 7.
emails.body: I'll try to call you later (or vice-versa) about the memo. Also, if you are willing, we'd love your participation in the credit/legal meeting. SS Carol St Clair 07/22/2000 09:12 AM

emails.subject: Re: Stephanie Panus just accepted!  She starts on August 7.
emails.subject_base: Stephanie Panus just accepted!  She starts on August 7.
emails.body: What's the best time to call you to discuss your memo? Also, unless I hear from you otherwise, I will plan on conferencing you into our legal/credit meeting tomorrow at 2:00 pm. I have your number as (281) 890-7122. Carol St Clair 07/22/2000 09:12 AM
